risk_if_not_implemented: Without Mobile Device Data Retention Limitations, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Media & Data Retention
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to retain media and data in accordance with applicable statutory, regulatory and contractual obligations.
compensating_control_1.justification: Media & Data Retention (DCH-18) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Mobile Device Data Retention Limitations (MDM-08) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: System Media Sanitization
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to sanitize system media with the strength and integrity commensurate with the classification or sensitivity of the information prior to disposal, release out of organizational control or release for reuse.
compensating_control_2.justification: System Media Sanitization (DCH-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Mobile Device Data Retention Limitations (MDM-08) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
